meta.description: A single action-and-expected-result step in a test case.

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_bae73b2c_427b_4fa4_9ffb_2f7871fd682a" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "action" TEXT,
    "expected_result" TEXT,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_bae73b2c_427b_4fa4_9ffb_2f7871fd682a" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_bae73b2c427b4fa4_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
